title: Volumes Across ETF Ecosystem "Are At Full Throttle" As Goldman Sees YTD Inflows Top $1 Trillion

fullArticle:
The acceleration of growth within the US-listed ETF ecosystem has been unprecedented as we enter the second half of the year.

As Goldman's ETF desk-head, Chris Lucas, notes, the triumvirate of industry assets, fund flows, and trading volumes are trending toward substantial double-digit gains over last year’s record-breaking performance across the board....
